Game.Name: NFL Quarterback Club 96 (Europe)
Game.plot: This game is the next-gen update of NFL Quarterback Club.Every team from the 1996 NFL season is shown here, with real player numbers and stats. 32 offensive plays and 16 defensive plays are available as you play. Options include setting quarter lengths, from one to 15 minutes, and selecting your mode of play: Preseason, Playoffs, or a full Season, in which you play 18 games towards the goal of the Super Bowl.Cheat: CodesEnter the following codes at the legal/copyright screen for the code to take effect. You will hear a "Click" noise if the code works. Also, you must first unlock the code on the cheat code screen while playing Simulation mode (Historic, not Custom) by beating a certain amount of the Simulation scenarios.
Game.Notes: This is the ultimate in football realism! Control any NFL player on offense or defense. 80 yards of viewable field... send 'em deep! Build your own dream team with the Custom Player feature. Player, game and full season stats... all the way to the Super Bowl. Over 800 plays including authentic QB signature plays. Perfect your gridiron skills in the exclusive Practice Mode.
